017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019
020/**
021 * Represents an HTTP <c>Last-Modified</c> header.
022 *
023 * <p>
024 * The last modification date of the origin resource.
025 *
026 * <p>
027 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
028 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
029 *
030 * @since 9.2.1
031 */
032import java.time.*;
033import java.util.function.*;
034
035/**
036 * @since 9.2.1
037 */
038public class LastModified extends HttpDateHeader {
039
040   public static final String NAME = "Last-Modified";
041
042   public LastModified(String value) {
043      super(NAME, value);
044   }
045
046   public LastModified(ZonedDateTime value) {
047      super(NAME, value);
048   }
049
050   private LastModified(Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
051      super(NAME, supplier, lazyMode);
052   }
053
054   public static LastModified of(String value) {
055      return new LastModified(value);
056   }
057
058   public static LastModified of(ZonedDateTime value) {
059      return new LastModified(value);
060   }
061
062   public static LastModified ofLazyWire(Supplier<String> supplier) {
063      return new LastModified(supplier, LAZY_WIRE_STRING);
064   }
065
066   public static LastModified ofLazyParsed(Supplier<ZonedDateTime> supplier) {
067      return new LastModified(supplier, LAZY_ZONED_DATE_TIME);
068   }
069}
